name: Spinach Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a pan and add cumin seeds. Sauté until fragrant.
2. Add chopped green chilies. Stir for 30 seconds.
3. Add onion and fry until it turns brown.
4. Add tomatoes and fry until softened.
5. Incorporate spinach and sauté for 2 minutes.
6. Cover the pan and simmer on low heat for 5 minutes.
7. Wash the rice and add to the spinach mixture along with salt and coriander powder. Stir well.
8. Gradually add water and bring the mixture to a boil.
9. Reduce heat to medium and cook for an additional 10 minutes until the rice is tender.
10. Lower the heat and continue cooking until everything is fully cooked.
